phases.name: Port the WASC operation framework into this project
phases.intent: Port the WASC operation framework into this project, except the bifurcated context (transposed to .context), including memory and CLAUDE.md elements. Active on the operations-constraint branch.
phases.goal: The WASC operation regime is operative here: its enforcement hooks, verify-gated iterate-to-zero loop, IMPL/AUDIT dispatch discipline, state-spine transposed to .context, prompt-render, command/agent/skills, governing decisions, and memory/CLAUDE.md elements.

phases.name: Pre-standup catalog fixes
phases.intent: Make the packaged catalog correct so a fresh new-substrate standup is born clean: back-port the consumed live-only vocabulary into samples/conception.json, resolve the catalog's state_derivation dangling reference, and fix validateRelations' edge-materialization-lens false-invalid.
phases.goal: A fresh init -> accept-all -> install substrate validates clean (context-validate + context-validate-relations) and accepts task_gated_by_item / task_advances_story / session_touches_item edges; FGAP-101 closed; FGAP-102 NOW leg addressed (forward forcing-function remains open).

phases.name: Ceremony brick closure
phases.intent: Config always loads or is sanctionedly recoverable. Members: TASK-071 (FGAP-096 config repair path), FGAP-106 (remediation hint in unresolvable-chain error), TASK-055 (update pre-flight dirty-check). Lane A spine position 3: gated on MILE-004.
phases.goal: An invalid or lagging config recovers through a sanctioned CLI path that validates the result; unresolvable-chain errors name write-schema-migration and the missing edge; update refuses to run over an uncommitted substrate.

phases.name: Catalog-config parity
phases.intent: A fresh install is complete and internally consistent. Members: FGAP-102 forward leg (build-time catalog-superset-of-consumed-vocabulary gate), TASK-067 (parity forcing-function), FGAP-067 (update reconciles changed catalog registry-entry bodies). Lane A spine position 4 (last): gated on MILE-001 so the gate lands against the corrected catalog.
phases.goal: A build-time gate asserts the catalog covers all consumed vocabulary across the four propagated registries and every state_derivation reference resolves; catalog drift cannot recur silently.

phases.name: Versioned-data convergence
phases.intent: schema_version everywhere, every read migration-aware, every resync honest, versions converge on write. Members: TASK-073 (FGAP-099 block schema_version stamping), FGAP-105 (write-time config version convergence), FGAP-107 (raw config readers to the migration-aware loader), issue-005 (same-version resync re-validates), issue-003 (update over-refusal), TASK-072 (FGAP-097 config-schema additive gate), FGAP-092 (update transactional boundary), FGAP-076 (update partial-application legibility). Lane A spine position 1: ungated, first — defines the envelope everything downstream stamps and reads. FGAP-105 fold-locus (writeConfigForDir vs generic writeTypedFile) is decided at this phase plan step, before TASK-057 dispatches.
phases.goal: FEAT-010 criteria 3, 4, and 6 met; no reader sees a different shape than the loader; persisted schema_version converges to current on write; update outcomes are legible and honor DEC-0018 per-component write boundary (never atomic).

phases.name: Install-state completeness
phases.intent: Evolving vocabularies materialize into installed substrates. Members: TASK-074 (FGAP-065 materialize declared blocks), FGAP-033 (pre-identity substrate resync — requires its DEC before execution). Lane A spine position 2: gated on MILE-003.
phases.goal: A block kind declared after install materializes via a sanctioned op; pre-identity substrates re-sync; context-bootstrap-state reports ready truthfully.

phases.name: Write-path integrity
phases.intent: No silently-wrong edge, no unwritable correction. Members: TASK-027 (FGAP-007 edge-direction guard), FGAP-093 (dangling/unregistered endpoint guard), FGAP-091 (warranted-edge forcing function — mechanism fork open), FGAP-085 (field deletion through update-block-item). Lane B: parallel with the Lane A spine from the start (edge-write region of context-sdk; soft-only overlap).
phases.goal: append-relation rejects mis-directed and dangling edges at write time; field deletion has a sanctioned path.

phases.name: Derivation truthfulness
phases.intent: Status, focus, ready, and blocked never misrepresent. Members: FGAP-103 (deliberate-suspension status — live false-focus instance on PHASE-PORT-OPS), FGAP-061 (gating relations feed ready/blocked), TASK-068 (FGAP-098 issues as gap-sibling open work), TASK-021 (FGAP-018 lifecycle metrics de-hardcoded), FEAT-004 (config-driven state derivation, class level). Fan-in: gated on MILE-003 (shared samples schema files: phase + issues envelope changes must not race the M3 envelope work).
phases.goal: Paused is representable and de-focuses; gating relations feed ready/blocked; issues rank as first-class open work; unconfigured derivation says so instead of guessing.

phases.name: Structural enforcement
phases.intent: The disciplines get forcing functions. Members: TASK-047 (FGAP-082 advancer-completion invariant class), TASK-041 (FEAT-007 decision-derivation backfill + invariant raise; substrate-only, may run early in a merge-queue slot), FGAP-071 (arc-coherence invariant), FGAP-086 (AJV cache versioned keying), FGAP-087 (non-array array-key loud path). Fan-in: gated on MILE-004 and MILE-005 (resyncSchema and validateContext are shared surfaces).
phases.goal: Advancer-completion and arc-coherence invariant classes exist and fire; decision-shows-derivation raised from warning per FEAT-007; the validator cache cannot serve stale schemas; degenerate resync shapes fail loud.

phases.name: Operator-surface truthfulness
phases.intent: CLI, ops, docs, and generation coherent with enforcement. Members: FGAP-104 (hermetic + fail-loud SKILL generation — lands FIRST in this lane; every other lane ceremonially runs the generator), FGAP-108 (context-switch target_dir contradiction), TASK-022 (FGAP-016 cap measures emitted form), TASK-057 (schema-history audit op), TASK-058 (migration-chain walk op), FGAP-044 (field-granular schema edit), FGAP-045 (block-kind rename cascade — locus undetermined, resolved at its plan step), TASK-054 (refinement). Lane C: parallel with Lanes A and B from the start. TASK-057 waits for the MILE-003 plan step to decide the FGAP-105 fold-locus if it touches migrations-store.
phases.goal: SKILL.md is a hermetic fail-loud function of the package alone; op contracts match enforcement; caps measure what is emitted; schema history and migration chains are auditable through ops.

phases.name: Multi-writer substrate
phases.intent: The collaboration expansion (deliberate feature work, not defect closure; DEC-0002/0004/0005 lineage). Members ordered by the filed TASK-005-depends-on-TASK-004 edge: TASK-004 (FEAT-002 structure-aware merge driver), TASK-005 (FEAT-003 sequence CRDT field-kind), TASK-003 (FEAT-001 substrate clone with provenance), FGAP-011 (release vocabulary). Last: gated on MILE-003 and MILE-005 — the driver merges what those paths write.
phases.goal: Substrates clone with provenance; parallel branch edits to substrate JSON merge structurally without mangling; ordered collections converge; single-writer operation remains unaffected throughout.

phases.name: Currency by construction
phases.intent: FEAT-011's member set: stored substrate state converges with derivable truth through the engine's own machinery. Members, in dependency order: TASK for rollup-consulting gate satisfaction (isCompleted unification, the FGAP-116 mechanism fix), derived-status invariant class, context-reconcile op v1, converge-on-write rollup stamping, delta-scoped write-time invariant evaluation, typed stale_conditions + citation content-pins, always-on drift surfacing in currentState, and the substrate-derived-state convention (resolving the milestone schema's dangling canon citation). Invariant every member preserves: the engine never fabricates authored judgment, and pre-existing substrates stay loadable/writable (expand-contract; legacy degrades, never breaks). Design basis composed verbatim from FEAT-011 + analysis/2026-07-05-currency-foreclosure-shape.md.
phases.goal: FEAT-011 criteria 1-8 met (criterion 9's residue statement rides the surfacing/reconcile tasks' docs); FGAP-116 closed; a currentState read never self-contradicts; divergence a write would create is surfaced at that write; fired research staleness is machine-flagged.

phases.name: Process harness — the canonical pipeline as a mechanical deny surface
phases.intent: Implement FEAT-013: convert the honor-system stretches of the canonical process into refusals the harness issues — the deny hooks, the phase-state layer with the findings ledger, the Stop-hook ask gate, user-minted authorization objects for HELD actions, and tracked self-tested wiring — so llm laziness and chaos-producing relitigation are foreclosed mechanistically while the three legitimate stops (provenance grants, honest scope/value escalations, HELD actions) are preserved everywhere.
phases.goal: Every FEAT-013 acceptance criterion is live: deviation from the canonical pipeline fails at a tool boundary with the governing rule named, turn-boundary relitigation is blocked by the Stop-hook three-stops filter, iterate-to-zero and closure evidence are mechanical, the release hold is impossible to breach without a user-minted grant, and the harness wiring is git-tracked with its own regression cells.

success_criteria.criterion: Each of FEAT-013's eleven acceptance criteria demonstrated live (true-positive refusal + legitimate-work pass per guard)
The three legitimate stops pass every gate (provenance ceremony, underdetermined-escalation ask, HELD-action ask)
Hook wiring tracked in .claude/settings.json and reproducible on a fresh checkout
